requirement.title: Pre-compile JSX so Vercel can serve the dashboard scripts
requirement.description: User-confirmed root cause via in-page diagnostic: Vercel/Next.js returns 404 for .jsx URLs under /dashboard/. Move JSX compilation to build time so the browser fetches plain .js, fixing the blank-screen blocker and removing @babel/standalone from the page weight.

triage.notes: Same diagnostic path as ADR-011; pre-compilation was already listed as the proper follow-up.

orchestrator.summary: build-jsx.mjs compiles 8 files; npm run build green; local dev smoke test confirms /dashboard/js/shared.js returns 200 application/javascript.
